items.definition_en: A meeting room is a place where people talk together for work.
items.example_en: We booked the meeting room for our team discussion.

items.definition_en: A whiteboard is a smooth board to write on with markers.
items.example_en: She drew the plan on the whiteboard during the meeting.

items.definition_en: A chair is a seat for one person, often with a back.
items.example_en: Each chair in the meeting space was comfortable.

items.definition_en: A table is a flat surface with legs where people put things.
items.example_en: There was a large table in the center of the meeting room.

items.definition_en: A window is a glass opening in a wall to let in light.
items.example_en: Natural light came into the meeting space through the window.

items.definition_en: A door is used to enter or exit a room.
items.example_en: Please close the door after you enter the meeting room.

items.definition_en: Light is what helps people see in a room.
items.example_en: The meeting space has bright light for reading.

items.definition_en: A clock shows the time in a room.
items.example_en: There is a clock on the wall in our meeting area.

items.definition_en: A podium is a small stand where someone speaks to a group.
items.example_en: The manager stood at the podium to give his speech.

items.definition_en: A flip chart is a paper pad used for writing during meetings.
items.example_en: He wrote the ideas on the flip chart for everyone to see.

items.definition_en: A sofa is a long seat for several people.
items.example_en: We sat on the sofa while waiting for the meeting.

items.definition_en: A waiting area is a space where people sit before meetings.
items.example_en: Guests waited in the waiting area before entering.

items.definition_en: A carpet is a soft cover for the floor.
items.example_en: The carpet made the meeting room feel more comfortable.

items.definition_en: A wall is a vertical part that makes up a room.
items.example_en: Photos were hanging on the wall of the meeting space.

items.definition_en: A ceiling is the top inside surface of a room.
items.example_en: The ceiling in the meeting space was very high.

items.definition_en: An air conditioner is a machine that keeps the room cool.
items.example_en: The air conditioner made the meeting space comfortable in summer.

items.definition_en: A plant is a living thing with green leaves.
items.example_en: There was a plant in the corner of the meeting room.

items.definition_en: A remote control is a device used to change things from far away.
items.example_en: She used the remote control to turn on the projector.

items.definition_en: A sign shows information or directions in a place.
items.example_en: There is a sign outside the meeting room door.

items.definition_en: A curtain is cloth that covers a window.
items.example_en: He closed the curtain to reduce sunlight during the meeting.
